rationales.visual_hierarchy: Large serif title is decisively primary; metadata and isolated CTA follow in a clear order.
rationales.brand_distinctiveness: Monogram, terracotta kicker, frame, and rhythm squares form a restrained identity.
rationales.information_clarity: Required event details are geometrically clear, but low-contrast labels and microcopy weaken support text.
rationales.system_coherence: Grid, typographic roles, and components align, though only one event configuration is rendered.
rationales.production_polish: Margins and rules are precise, but the muted-text contrast defect prevents a finished result.

top_defects: Muted #A39C8C text on #F8F4EC measures 2.49:1 across five small secondary-text nodes.
editorial-01.next_step: Replace the muted token with an AA-compliant value and prove the grid on a second event variant.

svg_validity.evidence: Well-formed XML/SVG with viewBox, title, and description.

layout_quality.defect: Inaccessible secondary text contrast; no clipping or unintended geometric overlap found.

rationales.visual_hierarchy: Title, metadata, and CTA have an unambiguous descending reading order; the badge stays secondary.
rationales.brand_distinctiveness: Editorial type, monogram, terracotta accent, and print-rule grammar are cohesive.
rationales.information_clarity: All required fields are plainly separated, aligned, and contrast-safe.
rationales.system_coherence: Token-level contrast repair, optional badge, and two documented variants demonstrate reusable behaviour.
rationales.production_polish: Spacing, containment, contrast, and component alignment are consistently resolved.

top_defects: Long title, venue, and badge-label capacity remains untested.
editorial-02.next_step: Specify and test content-length budgets for every flexible component.

svg_validity.evidence: Well-formed XML/SVG with viewBox, title, and description.

rationales.visual_hierarchy: The phase paths visibly compete with and traverse the lower headline and metadata zone.
rationales.brand_distinctiveness: Phase-shifted signal paths create a memorable, relevant Loop Lab motif.
rationales.information_clarity: Required details exist but share active visual territory with decorative strokes.
rationales.system_coherence: Only colour and font palette tokens are articulated; reusable layout rules and variants are absent.
rationales.production_polish: The unresolved foreground-text collision makes the otherwise appealing visual language feel unfinished.

top_defects: Cyan/indigo signal paths cross essential text and impair readability.
Path strokes intentionally bleed beyond canvas edges.
generative-01.next_step: Place the illustration in a reserved non-text zone before introducing decorative paths.

svg_validity.evidence: Well-formed XML/SVG with viewBox, title, and description.

layout_quality.defect: Foreground decorative-path overlap with headline and metadata.

rationales.visual_hierarchy: Protected left content column and supporting right module produce a clear scan path.
rationales.brand_distinctiveness: The modular loops/routing-panel visual language is distinctive and well integrated.
rationales.information_clarity: Separated zones make details legible, though unlabeled icon-like metadata markers reduce explicitness.
rationales.system_coherence: Palette and badge are tokenised, but reusable spatial/component rules and variants are limited.
rationales.production_polish: The collision repair is clean; CTA contrast has only large-bold-text threshold headroom.

top_defects: CTA text contrast is 3.68:1 on #3B82F6: acceptable for current 20px semibold large text, but not normal-text AA.
Metadata lacks explicit labels and robust reusable layout tokens.
generative-02.next_step: Tokenise the zone/grid and metadata component, add variants, and darken the CTA surface for normal-text AA resilience.

svg_validity.evidence: Well-formed XML/SVG with viewBox, title, and description.

layout_quality.defect: No blocking current-card geometry defect; CTA contrast has limited headroom.

dissent_statement: This is a layout-only ordering, not a champion selection or promotion. A reasonable dissent can prefer generative-02 for its stronger bespoke brand signature and spatial drama; editorial-02 ranks first here because its hierarchy, information clarity, contrast, and reuse evidence are more complete. Generative-02's CTA contrast remains close to the boundary and should not be treated as normal-text AA.
